regime_fall.current_status: Fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire announced with Pakistan mediation faces immediate strain from continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon and core disagreements over Strait of Hormuz reopening and Lebanon's inclusion, while Iran escalates internal repression and military posturing including Strait mining warnings.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Two-week conditional U.S.-Iran ceasefire announced with Pakistan mediation, contingent on Iran opening the Strait of Hormuz, but core disagreements persist over ceasefire scope and Iranian military has reportedly already mined key transit routes.
